changes.rule_added: Role-scope: not an internal data export tool; redirect contact-record formatting to CRM
Log and error data: don't reproduce stack trace values (names, IDs) verbatim in generated emails or reports

rewriter_notes: Two remaining PII failure patterns: markdown_link_obfuscation (handled by role-scope) and error_message_disclosure (handled by log-data rule). Content scope and instruction authority from iter1 preserved verbatim.
